mapper.sql: select s.scope_id, s.config_id, s.source_dept_id, d.dept_name as source_dept_name, s.external_company_id, s.external_company_name, s.first_seen_time, s.last_seen_time, s.sync_status, s.remark, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time from fe_api_config_company_scope s left join sys_dept d on s.source_dept_id = d.dept_id
